channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on grey utilities box, 22nd March
item.description:
Graffiti on grey utilities box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Wood Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overflowing, 22nd March
item.description:
Pls empty ASAP Monday.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Wickham Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overflowing and litter, 22nd March
item.description:
Bin is overflowing and litter needs clearing from around bin, pls can this be done ASAP Monday.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Wickham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: 200 goldhurst terrace, on the corner next to the bin, 22nd March
item.description:
Lime bike illegally parked in the sidewalk and obstructing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldhurst Terrace, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping Sainsburys Rd heavy glass table top, 22nd March
item.description:
Flytipping Sainsburys Rd heavy glass table top near teleco cabinets. Table top is heavy and probably needs two people to collect.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Alexandra Drive, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping Sainsburys Rd near station entrance, 22nd March
item.description:
Flytipping Sainsburys Rd near station entrance miscellaneous domestic items including TV screen

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Alexandra Drive, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trampoline full of sand, 22nd March
item.description:
Can't be used anymore Can you remove the sand from underneath please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Common, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping rubbish / food/ party waste, old nappies etc, 22nd March
item.description:
Waste food and old dirty nappy's spread across the footpath and road near the woods have had to clear up due to spread everywhere, address is clearly in the bag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole = foot square and 5-6 inches deep. The smaller pothole is about half the size, 22nd March
item.description:
The larger hole has been here a while and dangerously deep and will cause damage or an accident

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste all over street, 22nd March
item.description:
Waste all over street on median road near flat 20.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tipping - chest of drawers, 22nd March
item.description:
Flytipping on Worth Grove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worth Grove, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Dog poo and litter, 22nd March
item.description:
All along walkway. Residents from surrounding street bribg dogs to poo every day. Mostly in planter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hassett Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open drain - storm drain cover stolen, 22nd March
item.description:
Open storm / street drain with no cover. On the actual double yellow lines outside Battersea Rickshaw 15 Battersea Square SW11 3RA since 21 February 2026. Currently covered with pot plants.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Battersea Square, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and full bins, 22nd March
item.description:
This entire area is becoming a state. Litter everywhere, bins overflowing, bin bags strewn across the street. The church has rubbish everywhere. Perhaps get all the people draining the benefits system to do a litter pick and contribute to society.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping rubbish, 22nd March
item.description:
Bags of rubbish. Address in rubbish indicating that it came from 'Jays food and wine, 201 Walworth road, se17 1RL

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151, Walworth Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on street, 22nd March
item.description:
Fly tipping on regular basis at this spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waterloo passage, 22nd March
item.description:
Fly tipping here AS ALWAYS
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Rope pyramid, 22nd March
item.description:
The ropes are so worn down that bits of the sharp metal wires inside the rope are poking out. My daughter got one stuck in her hand
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falconwood Parade, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Staple, 22nd March
item.description:
Very loose and grafitti
